reason: While this is a standard STIG hardening pattern, the remediation involves modifying PAM (Pluggable Authentication Modules) via authselect. Incorrect PAM configuration can lead to a complete lockout of all users, including root, from the system. The remediation script itself includes a check for authselect integrity, indicating that manual or automated errors in this area carry significant risk of system lockout.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential for total system lockout if PAM configuration is corrupted; Risk of losing console/SSH access if faillock is misconfigured; Dependency on authselect profile integrity
